name: aidd-framework
description: Official plugin marketplace for the AI-Driven Development framework

plugins.name: aidd-context
plugins.description: Knowledge production: project init, architecture/context generation, brainstorm, challenge, mermaid, learn, discovery

plugins.name: aidd-dev
plugins.description: Code transformation: SDLC orchestrator, plan, assert, audit, review, test, refactor, debug, for-sure. Hosts agents.

plugins.name: aidd-vcs
plugins.description: External artifacts: commit, pull-request, release-tag, issue-create

plugins.name: aidd-pm
plugins.description: Product management (release candidate): ticket-info, user-stories-create, prd
